global_description: A small, plump songbird with an olive-brown back and a white underbelly. It features a distinctive orange crown stripe bordered by black lines on its head. The bird has a rounded body with a short tail and pinkish legs.
discriminative_attributes: Orange crown stripe with black borders

part_details.head: Olive-brown with a central orange crown stripe bordered by black lines.
part_details.body: Rounded, olive-brown on top with a white underbelly.
part_details.tail: Short and rounded, matching the body color.

spatial_relations: The orange crown stripe runs longitudinally along the top of the head.
The white underbelly contrasts with the olive-brown back.
The pinkish legs extend downward from the rounded body.
